Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a Python script using the pm4py library to construct a specific ProcessTree based on a detailed textual description of a hospital patient management process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 1 Arrival and Initial Steps Sequence Activity A Arrival Activity RG Registration Activity IA Intake Assessment Structure Sequence of A RG IA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 2 Triage Sequence Activity TI Triage Interview Activity TC Triage Classification Structure Sequence of TI TC Relation to Step 1 Sequential after Step 1 Current combined structure A RG IA TI TC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 3 Initial Diagnostic Test Exclusive Choice XOR Option 1 CE Comprehensive ECG Option 2 FBP Full Blood Panel Structure X CE FBP Relation to previous Sequential after Step 2

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Let us define A as the block containing the specialist and treatment and re diagnosis Let us call this block LoopBody LoopBody consists of SC X TM SPT X FCE FBA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The prompt defines it explicitly A is executed then either you exit the loop or you execute B and then A again

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If there is no explicit activity required to restart other than the condition it is often a silent step tau So LoopNode equals loop of sequence SC XOR TM SPT XOR FCE FBA with tau

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 5 Advanced Imaging and Counseling Parallel Concurrency Activity AI Advanced Imaging Activity NC Nutritional Counseling Structure parallel AI NC Relation Sequential after the loop finishes normal results

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 6 Final Admin Sequence Activity FAS Follow up Appointment Scheduling Activity DDI Detailed Discharge Instructions Structure sequence FAS DDI Relation Sequential after Step 5

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 7 Final Clearance Parallel Activity BL Billing Activity ICP Insurance Claims Processing Activity MRF Medical Records Finalization Structure parallel BL ICP MRF Relation Sequential after Step 6

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Root Sequence of major phases one two and three four five six seven

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let us combine into one big root sequence Root equals sequence of sequence A RG IA sequence TI TC XOR CE FBP LoopNode parallel AI NC sequence FAS DDI parallel BL ICP MRF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Note that adding the process trees as children is not enough Their parent should be explicitly set to the parent node I must ensure parent is passed to constructor or assigned later

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Double check the Loop definition usage My mapping loop node has sequence loop body as A and tau as B This matches the requirement This can happen multiple times until the results are deemed normal
